nl_statement: Definitions for the Stochastic Heavy Ball iteration: shbStep, shbState, shbIter (deterministic); shbStochStep, shbStochState, shbStochIter (with explicit noise sequence ξ : ℕ → E); plus the stability region S(L) = {(β,η) : 0 ≤ β < 1, 0 < η ≤ 2(1+β)/L} and the Goujaud feasibility region F(L) characterised by η·L·(1+β+β²) ≤ 2(1-β²).
assumptions: E real vector space (AddCommGroup E + Module ℝ E) for iterations; pure ℝ for regions
reuse_reason: every SHB convergence proof needs these definitions
